name: Krasukha-4
description: Russian broadband multifunctional jamming system targeting airborne radars and AWACS. Operates in X and Ku bands creating broad electronic denial zones affecting UAV datalinks and surveillance systems.
how_to_detect: Distinctive high-power RF emissions on X/Ku band
Large vehicle signature on satellite imagery
how_to_counter: Autonomous flight modes with pre-programmed waypoints
